subprocess_flow.description: Analyze the approved Risk Mitigation Plan and Technical Architecture to identify specific technical requirements for security, privacy, and quality controls. This ensures that the implementation phase is directly aligned with the identified risks and the overall system design.
success_criteria: All risks mapped to specific technical implementation tasks.
Roadmap approved by the project lead.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To translate high-level risk mitigations into a technical execution plan.
subprocess_flow.scope: Analysis of risk and architecture documents for the specific AI project.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Peer review of the implementation roadmap.

subprocess_flow.description: Define and implement granular access controls, roles, and permissions for the AI environment. This involves setting up service accounts, user groups, and resource-level permissions to ensure the principle of least privilege is strictly enforced across all justice data assets.
success_criteria: Access restricted to authorized personnel only.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To prevent unauthorized access to the AI system and its data.
subprocess_flow.scope: User and service account permissions within the project environment.

subprocess_flow.description: Apply encryption protocols for data at rest within storage systems and data in transit across network layers. This step utilizes MoJ-approved cryptographic standards to protect sensitive justice data from interception or unauthorized viewing during the AI lifecycle.
success_criteria: Encryption verified for all data paths and storage buckets.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure data confidentiality at all stages of the AI lifecycle.
subprocess_flow.scope: Data storage and network communication layers.

subprocess_flow.description: Develop and integrate automated scripts and rules to validate data integrity, completeness, and accuracy. These rules are applied at ingestion and during processing to ensure the AI model operates on high-fidelity data, minimizing the risk of biased judicial outcomes.
success_criteria: Automated alerts triggered for data quality violations.
Validation logic covers all critical data fields.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To maintain high data standards and prevent model degradation.
subprocess_flow.scope: Data validation logic within the AI pipeline.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Poor data quality leading to biased outcomes.

subprocess_flow.description: Implement technical privacy safeguards such as data masking, anonymization, or differential privacy as specified in the Risk Mitigation Plan. This ensures that person-identifiable information (PII) is protected during model training and inference phases.
success_criteria: PII is appropriately masked or anonymized according to the DPIA.
Data utility remains sufficient for model performance.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To protect individual privacy while enabling data-driven insights.
subprocess_flow.scope: Privacy transformations applied to project data.

subprocess_flow.description: Set up comprehensive logging for all system access, data modifications, and model executions. These logs are integrated with the MoJ central security monitoring system to enable real-time threat detection and maintain a robust audit trail.
success_criteria: Logs are successfully ingested by the central monitoring platform.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide visibility into system activity and support incident response.
subprocess_flow.scope: Logging and monitoring configuration for the AI environment.

subprocess_flow.description: Execute rigorous testing to ensure that all implemented technical controls (security, privacy, and quality) are functioning correctly. This includes functional testing of encryption, access control verification, and data quality rule validation.
success_criteria: 100% pass rate for all security and quality control tests.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To verify the effectiveness of implemented safeguards.
subprocess_flow.scope: Functional and security testing of all technical controls.

subprocess_flow.description: Finalize the configuration of the AI environment by applying final security patches and locking down network ports. All implemented controls are documented in detail to support the subsequent verification and audit phase.
success_criteria: Environment is locked down according to MoJ standards.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To prepare the environment for production use and audit.
